questions.question: What country's cops were the first to subject motorists to Breathalyzer tests?
What celebrated photographer snapped shots of Yosemite for 67 straight years?
Who was barefoot in a beach trailer wearing a Ban-Lon shirt when told the House was voting articles of impeachment against him?
What decade saw the production of U.S. radios jump from zero to five million?
What South African has traveled more miles than any athlete in history?
What university's students, streaking to protest Playboy's 1995 "Girls of the Ivy League" photo shoot, made it into the layout?
